title: Peperomia tithymaloides
taxonomy: Peperomia tithymaloides is classified within the family Piperaceae and is a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the genus Peperomia, a group of small, compact plants that are commonly known as radiator plants. The family Piperaceae is a group of flowering plants that also includes the genus Piper, which includes the pepper plant. Peperomia tithymaloides is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Its classification also places it within the order Piperales.
